# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: my-app
description: A Helm chart for deploying my application
version: 1.0.0
appVersion: 1.0.0
dependencies: []
keywords: []

annotations:
  maintainers:
    - name: Your Name
      email: yourname@example.com
  tags:
    - myapp
    - deployment

values: {}

templates:
  NOTES.txt: |-
    Thank you for using my-app!

    To see the application service, run:

      kubectl get svc {{ template "my-app.fullname" . }} -n {{ .Release.Namespace }}

    Enjoy!
